description_long: This is a compact, semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a robust, modern design. The frame and slide are constructed from metal, featuring subtle angular lines and a squared-off trigger guard. The grip is ergonomically contoured with visible textured panels for enhanced handling, and the magazine base is slightly extended and beveled for easier reloading. The slide has minimal external markings, and the barrel is short, flush with the slide, and lacks external threading or compensators. The overall build suggests a reliable, concealable firearm suitable for urban environments, with all major components—slide, barrel, trigger, and magazine—clearly defined.
description: A compact, matte black semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, squared trigger guard, and minimal slide markings. The design is modern and robust, suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the muzzle, showing the circular barrel opening and front sight, with the slide and frame symmetrically aligned.
description_view_1: A full left-side profile reveals the slide serrations, ejection port, trigger, and the detailed grip texture, as well as the magazine base and rear sight.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the slide, rear sight, hammer, and the checkered grip panels, with the magazine base visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: The right-side profile displays the slide, grip, trigger guard, and magazine base, mirroring the left side but with slightly different lighting and detail visibility.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a slight palm swell and features a checkered texture for improved traction. It appears to be made of a durable polymer or rubberized material, with two visible fasteners securing the grip panels. The lower portion of the grip is slightly flared to aid in magazine insertion, and there are no visible finger grooves or logos, giving it a clean, functional appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared-off with a robust, thick profile and a slight undercut at the rear for enhanced finger placement. Its surface is smooth with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and the overall size is ample, providing sufficient space for gloved use. The design is modern and practical, lacking any integrated accessories or decorative elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the front of the slide, exhibiting a standard round profile without threading, porting, or compensators. There are no visible external markings or fluting, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide is largely unadorned, with no visible manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers. There is a single, small circular marking on the left side, possibly a takedown pin or indicator, but no prominent engravings or decorative patterns are present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly extended and beveled, providing a subtle flare for easier magazine removal and insertion. It is flat on the bottom with no finger rest, logos, or additional texturing, maintaining a streamlined and functional appearance.
